ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-07-2023 Continued To Apr-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-24-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peggy Nicholson, via Zoom, for Ann A. Waterhouse, Personal Representative.

The court advises that it intends to grant the petition and continue administration of this Estate as prayed in the instant petition. The court and counsel discuss the status of the interpleader action and whether counsel has considered filing a petition for final distribution with an order to include an omnibus clause. Counsel reports that the interpleader action seems to be moving forward and that she intends this report to be the final report and has considered the court's suggestion and may proceed as suggested if the interpleader action has not progressed by February of next year.

The Status Petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Off Calendar Jun-18-2019 Continued To Jul-16-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that this date was set in an order filed June 15, 2018 in response to a prior petition. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on July 16, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
